text: COVID-19 vaccines contain microchips that track people's movements.
fact_check: Multiple fact-checking organizations have verified that COVID-19 vaccines do not contain microchips. The vaccines contain mRNA or viral vector components, lipids, salts, and sugars. No tracking devices are present in any approved vaccine.

text: The Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye.
fact_check: NASA astronauts have confirmed that the Great Wall of China is not visible from low Earth orbit without aid. The wall is narrow and blends with the natural landscape, making it indistinguishable from orbit.

text: Drinking warm water with lemon cures cancer.
fact_check: There is no scientific evidence that lemon water can cure cancer. While lemons contain vitamin C and antioxidants that are part of a healthy diet, they cannot treat or cure cancer. Cancer treatment requires medical intervention.

text: Wind turbines cause cancer in nearby residents.
fact_check: A comprehensive review by health authorities found no evidence linking wind turbines to cancer. Studies on wind farm health effects have examined noise and shadow flicker but found no carcinogenic mechanisms.

Viruses cannot travel on radio waves or mobile networks. COVID-19 is caused by SARS-CoV-2 and spreads through respiratory droplets. 5G technology uses radio frequencies that do not interact with biological viruses.

text: Eating chocolate every day prevents heart disease.
fact_check: While some studies suggest moderate dark chocolate consumption may have cardiovascular benefits due to flavonoids, claiming it prevents heart disease is an overstatement. Heart disease prevention requires comprehensive lifestyle changes.

text: The earth is flat and NASA has been faking space imagery.
fact_check: Overwhelming scientific evidence from multiple independent sources confirms Earth is an oblate spheroid. Satellite imagery, physics, and centuries of astronomical observation support this. Photos from space agencies worldwide corroborate Earth's shape.

text: Electric vehicles produce more total emissions than gasoline cars.
fact_check: Life-cycle analyses show that while EV manufacturing has higher emissions, total lifetime emissions are significantly lower than gasoline vehicles in most regions. The break-even point typically occurs within 1-3 years of driving.

text: Immigrants commit crimes at higher rates than native-born citizens.
fact_check: Multiple large-scale studies in the US and Europe have found that immigrants commit crimes at equal or lower rates compared to native-born citizens. Incarceration rates among immigrants are consistently lower.

text: Artificial sweeteners are more dangerous than sugar.
fact_check: Regulatory agencies including the FDA and EFSA have approved several artificial sweeteners as safe for consumption at normal levels. While ongoing research continues, current evidence does not support claims that approved sweeteners are more dangerous than sugar.
